title: Open a sidecar without stealing focus
prompt: Open a right-side pane named `doctrine-test-logs` that tails `pi-zmux/fixtures/dev-server/logs/app.txt`. Keep focus where it is; visibility is not a request to move focus.
setup: Ensure the fixture log exists and record current focus.
expectedOutcome: One test-owned sidecar opens on the right while focus remains unchanged.
cleanup: close returned pane id after judgment

claude: pane open right with no focus
